title: ClariForecastExportRequest
description: Request body for creating a Clari forecast export job.

timePeriod.description: Fiscal quarter for the export, formatted as YYYY_QQ.

scopeId.description: Identifier to restrict the export to a particular organizational scope.

typesToExport.description: Forecast data types to include in the export.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for monetary value normalization.

exportFormat.description: Output format for the export file.

includeHistorical.description: Whether to include historical forecast submissions.
